arts.ttl: Ticket info: Arsenal v Newcastle United
arts.sum: Gold members can purchase their own season ticket seat(s) from 12pm on Monday, December 23, which will be reserved online and held until 12pm Friday, December 27. BALLOT GROUP PURCHASE WINDOW OPENS SUCCESSFUL APPLICANTS CHARGED BALLOT STATUS Disability Access December 30, 12pm ✘ Closed Silver ✘ December 31 (approx) Closed Red ✘ January 2 (approx) Closed

arts.ttl: Ticket info: Arsenal v Manchester United
arts.sum: Please note that due to event requirements, those affected Gold members who will be relocated for this game and who have signed up to the Cup Scheme in Blocks 28-30 and part of block 31, will not be charged and will have the opportunity to purchase a seat in the self-serve window as advertised below on Tuesday, December 31. For any supporters whose payment card fails, you will automatically be given an opportunity to purchase your own seat in the exclusive season ticket holder priority window advertised below.

Gabriel Martinelli has scored more Premier League goals against Crystal Palace than he has vs any other opponent (5). We’re off to Selhurst Park for our second game of the week against Crystal Palace at 5.30pm on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus decision made as £42m man returns: Arsenal predicted XI v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to build on their midweek Carabao Cup against Crystal Palace when they take on the same opposition in the Premier League on...

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Palace's wing-backs can thwart Arsenal's goal threat
arts.sum: Wing-backs Daniel Munoz, whose 56 tackles is a competition-high, and Tyrick Mitchell, with 41, are the two most frequent challenge makers, while midfielder Will Hughes (37) is not far behind. In recent seasons they have had close-fought battles, but the way Saka turned and slipped a clever assist pass into Gabriel Jesus in midweek will have made the Eagles' left-back feel a touch more anxious.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Arsenal sent £40m transfer warning as Bundesliga chief confirms attacker stance
arts.sum: Chelsea and Arsenal are warned that it would take more than £40m to sign Borussia Dortmund protege Jamie Gittens in 2025.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace - Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal's predicted lineup vs Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal learn Xavi Simons price tag as transfer 'decision' emerges
arts.sum: Reports in recent weeks have claimed that Simons could be on the move next summer, this time on a permanent deal away from PSG. The Gunners have been heavily linked with a move for the Paris Saint-Germain star for several weeks, with the 21-year-old currently on loan with RB Leipzig in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed major boost as Crystal Palace to be without key man for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Selhurst Park is the venue for Saturday's Premier League clash, with Arsenal looking for a similar result to the Carabao Cup clash in order to keep up the pressure on league leaders Liverpool, who face Tottenham in the big game on Sunday afternoon. Arsenal and Crystal Palace will renew acquaintances on Saturday afternoon, four days after the two teams did battle in the Carabao Cup quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on five year Arsenal anniversary, Declan Rice fitness and Tierney
arts.sum: Just try to give your best version every single day and think what is the best possible manager for Arsenal football club and it’s players and become that. A lot of times we share that with the club whether it’s people from the past or people right now.
